description: Leiningen project.clj is read via a custom regex manager + the clojure datasource. Kafka and Confluent are grouped and pinned to their own registries; major bumps wait for manual approval (they need live-broker validation).

packageRules.description: Default: resolve all Clojure deps from Clojars + Maven Central.
Resolve Apache Kafka against Maven Central only, so Confluent's republished 8.x-ce builds never masquerade as upgrades.
Confluent client libs come from Confluent's repo (Maven Central as fallback).
Kafka and Confluent ship paired releases - move them together.
Major Kafka/Confluent bumps need live-broker validation - gate behind manual approval.
Keep jackson-core and jackson-databind on the same line.
